allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('git'\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,10\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).startsWith\('git'\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,20\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('username:', d['profile']['username']\); print\('ownedRepos:', d['profile']['ownedRepos']\); print\('overallScore:', d['scores']['overallScore']\); print\('summary:', d['insights']['summary'][:120]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('username:', d.profile?.username\); console.log\('ownedRepos:', d.profile?.ownedRepos\); console.log\('overallScore:', d.scores?.overallScore\); console.log\('AI summary:', d.insights?.summary?.slice\(0,120\)\); console.log\('error:', d.error\)")
